title: ✨ Classic Palindrome Sentence
input: A man, a plan, a canal: Panama
description: 🧼 Valid palindrome after removing spaces, punctuation, and converting to lowercase.

title: ❌ Non-Palindrome String
description: 🔁 String is not the same when reversed after cleaning.

title: 🌫️ Only Spaces
description: 🤯 Empty string after cleaning is considered a palindrome.

title: 🔤 Single Character
description: ✅ A single character is always a palindrome.

title: 🔠 Mixed Case Palindrome
description: 🔄 Case-insensitive check results in a valid palindrome.

title: 🔢 Alphanumeric Palindrome
description: ✨ Numbers and letters together can form a palindrome.

title: 🚫 Special Characters Only
description: 🧼 All characters are removed, resulting in an empty palindrome.

title: 🇺🇸 Palindrome With Symbols
description: ✨ Valid palindrome after ignoring symbols and case.

title: 📏 Long Non-Palindrome
input: This is definitely not a palindrome
description: ❌ Clearly not symmetric after cleaning.

title: 🔢 Palindrome With Numbers
description: ✅ Numeric palindrome remains valid.

title: 🧠 Palindrome With Mixed Noise
input: Able!!! was I @@ ere I saw Elba
description: ✨ Classic palindrome with heavy punctuation and mixed casing.

title: 🧹 Trailing and Leading Spaces
description: 🚫 Spaces at both ends should be ignored.

title: ⚠️ Almost Palindrome
description: ❌ Single mismatch breaks palindrome property.

title: 🔢 Even Length Palindrome
description: ✅ Even-length numeric palindrome.

title: 🔢 Odd Length Palindrome
description: ✅ Odd-length numeric palindrome.

title: 🔤 Case Sensitive Trap
description: 🔄 Case should be ignored, making it a palindrome.

title: 🚫 Alpha Numeric Non-Palindrome
description: ❌ Alphanumeric string that is not symmetric.

title: 🔁 Repeated Characters
description: 🧼 Special characters removed, leaving a palindrome.

title: 🚗 Long Palindrome Sentence
input: Was it a car or a cat I saw?
description: ✨ Valid palindrome with spaces and punctuation.

title: 🔢 Numbers With Spaces
description: 🧹 Spaces ignored, numeric palindrome holds.

title: 🧪 Mixed Invalid Characters
description: ✨ Special characters removed, resulting in palindrome.

title: ⚡ One Mismatch In Middle
description: ❌ Mismatch in middle prevents palindrome.

title: 🟰 All Same Characters
description: ✅ Same character repeated is always a palindrome.

title: 🌪️ Long Non-Palindrome With Noise
description: ❌ Cleaning still results in non-palindrome.

title: 🔀 Mixed Case and Digits Palindrome
description: ✨ Case-insensitive alphanumeric palindrome.
